_comment: validate_layer0 waiver registry. Per decision C (Layer0_AuthoringModel_DBSourceOfTruth_Design_v1.md §5.2, Andy 2026-06-10): only `sum_to_100` carries waivers (sports whose adjusted stack legitimately falls short of the per-phase threshold by design). `vocab_alignment` and `contraindicated_conditions` violations must be FIXED in the data, not waived — that policy is enforced by review of this file, not by code. Every waiver needs: check, id (the violation id the gate prints), reason, added (YYYY-MM-DD), by. The genesis-snapshot waiver set is empty until the gate's first DB run enumerates the real sub-100 sports.
